## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic collaboration discussion between GrowthX and SentinelOne, focusing on AI-driven content creation, analytics, and potential expansion of services.](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is experiencing rapid growth, with AI Answers becoming crucial for first customer interactions](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [SentinelOne is satisfied with GrowthX's services but seeks clarity on the full suite of offerings](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [GrowthX is developing Atlas, a comprehensive platform for content creation, analytics, and customer interaction](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [Potential expansion into AI-driven SDR support and company research briefings, similar to work done for Okta/Auth0](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)

## Topics

### Market Positioning and Investor Interest

  - [Significant investor interest in GrowthX, with many reaching out to SentinelOne for customer perspective](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [GrowthX experiencing strong growth curve, particularly with AI Answers](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [CMOs increasingly focused on AI-driven content creation and market research](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### GrowthX Platform and Services

  - [Atlas platform in development, offering:](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
      - [AI visibility tools](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
      - [Knowledge base for research](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
      - [Activity feed of GrowthX team actions](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
      - [Analytics and ROI modeling](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [Fact-checking process for content accuracy, crucial for public companies](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [Creation of detailed vulnerability catalogs and content pieces (e.g., 100+ for SentinelOne)](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)

### Content Creation and Publishing Challenges

  - [Bottlenecks in review process and production for SentinelOne](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [Need for streamlined publishing access and processes](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [Success stories with other clients (e.g., Augment, Webflow) showing rapid content creation and traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)

### Analytics and Competitive Intelligence

  - [Upcoming launch of CheckThat.ai, a "Crunchbase for visibility"](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
  - [Tracking visibility across software categories and companies](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
  - [Democratizing data access for competitive intelligence](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)

### Potential Expansion of Services

  - [AI-driven SDR support, similar to work done for Okta/Auth0](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Creation of detailed company briefs and industry-specific resources for sales teams](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Potential to integrate with existing tools (ZoomInfo, HG Insights, DemandBase, etc.) for enhanced data](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send investment memo to Bryan for additional context](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
  - [Explore potential for AI-driven SDR support for SentinelOne, pending current partnership success](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue development of Atlas platform and prepare for customer access](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Bryan offered to support GrowthX's growth efforts, including speaking with potential investors](https://fathom.video/share/e-xkpxC7Kc-nZKcRTWqyhgVpPZ7sqGpB?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
